name: Provider Category Summaries
note: This file intentionally avoids naming individual providers or exposing affiliate/apply details.

entries.label: Working Capital Network
entries.description: Potential capital paths for operators with recurring deposits and short-term cash flow needs.

entries.label: Business Line Network
entries.description: Potential revolving-access paths for businesses with stronger revenue, credit, and operating history.

entries.label: Startup / Credit-Leverage Network
entries.description: Potential paths for newer operators where credit and income may matter more than business history.

entries.label: Asset-Secured Capital Network
entries.description: Potential paths for equipment, vehicles, trucks, real estate, and other asset-backed needs.

entries.label: Marketplace Seller Capital Network
entries.description: Potential paths for ecommerce sellers with platform/store sales history.
